mapper.select: SELECT role.id as roleId, role.deleted, role.created_at as createdAt, role.modified_at as modifiedAt, role.role_name as roleName, role.content FROM role WHERE role.id = #{id}
SELECT role.id, role.role_name as roleName, role.deleted, role.create_user_id as createUserId, role.created_at as createdAt, role.modified_at as modifiedAt FROM role WHERE role.id is not NULL
